<!--
PR title must be a Conventional Commit, e.g. `feat: add X` or `fix: correct Y`.
Releases are cut from PR titles, so the type prefix is required.
-->

## What

<!-- What does this change do? One or two sentences. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem it solves, or the directive/issue it addresses. -->

## Verification

<!-- How you confirmed it works — the command you ran and what you observed.
     "Tests pass" is not enough; name the real artifact you checked. -->

- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] CI green (lint, tests, privacy/security gates)
- [ ] No false claims — every statement here and in the docs is demonstrably true
- [ ] Privacy-clean (no secrets or internal-only names) for public repos
